{
  "project": "TraderFrame — Evidence Gate",
  "stage": "Effect Inventory",
  "brand_principles": [
    "Evidence first",
    "Transparent reasoning",
    "User control",
    "Risk awareness",
    "Calm precision"
  ],
  "effects": [
    {
      "id": "fx-01-noise-field",
      "name": "The Entropy Grid",
      "narrative_purpose": "Represents the chaotic, unverified state of raw market data before it is ingested, filtered, and structured by TraderFrame.",
      "visual_metaphor": "A vast, semi-translucent cloud of drifting, unsorted data fragments that lack cohesion or direction.",
      "technical_implementation": {
        "type": "GPU Particle System & Vertex Shader",
        "details": "A Compute Shader drives 50,000 micro-particles using 3D Simplex Curl Noise. Particle alpha and size are modulated by their distance from the active filtering plane. Unfiltered particles use a low-saturation, cool-gray palette to avoid visual fatigue."
      },
      "interaction_trigger": "Passive ambient state; density increases slightly when the user hovers over raw data sources.",
      "brand_alignment": "Contrasts the initial chaos with 'Calm precision' once the user initiates filtering."
    },
    {
      "id": "fx-02-sieve-plane",
      "name": "The Sieve (Filtering Pass)",
      "narrative_purpose": "Demonstrates the active, transparent extraction of credible evidence from raw market noise, giving the user immediate visual feedback of the filtering process.",
      "visual_metaphor": "A sharp, luminous horizontal plane sweeping downward, dissolving chaotic noise particles and leaving behind structured, glowing evidence nodes.",
      "technical_implementation": {
        "type": "Custom Fragment Shader with Clip-Plane Transition",
        "details": "Uses a signed distance field (SDF) plane to discard raw particles. At the intersection boundary, a high-intensity emissive ramp (using a smoothstep gradient) creates a crisp, glowing edge. Dissolving particles transition into structured grid nodes using a vertex-morphing interpolation."
      },
      "interaction_trigger": "Triggered when the user initiates an 'Ingest & Filter' command.",
      "brand_alignment": "Directly supports 'Evidence first' by showing the physical separation of signal from noise."
    },
    {
      "id": "fx-03-stress-test",
      "name": "The Volatility Stress Chamber",
      "narrative_purpose": "Visualizes the 'challenging' phase of the decision process, where evidence nodes are subjected to simulated market shocks to prove their resilience.",
      "visual_metaphor": "A localized force field that pulses around selected evidence nodes, testing their structural integrity with waves of chromatic distortion.",
      "technical_implementation": {
        "type": "Raymarched Volumetric Sphere Shader",
        "details": "A glass-like refractive sphere envelope surrounding the node. A vertex displacement shader applies high-frequency noise pulses to the envelope. If the node passes the stress test, the displacement dampens into a perfectly calm, smooth spherical shell with subtle chromatic aberration at the edges."
      },
      "interaction_trigger": "Triggered when the user runs a 'Stress Test' or 'Risk Scenario' simulation on a selected evidence node.",
      "brand_alignment": "Embodies 'Risk awareness' and 'Transparent reasoning' by visually demonstrating how evidence holds up under pressure."
    },
    {
      "id": "fx-04-reasoning-threads",
      "name": "Reasoning Threads",
      "narrative_purpose": "Maps the logical connections between verified evidence nodes
warning: Provider returned invalid JSON. Preserved as raw text.
